data.title: Login button unresponsive on Safari
data.description: Click events on the primary login button are ignored on Safari 17 due to passive event listeners.

data.title: Footer links misaligned on mobile
data.description: Flex container breaks at 360px width causing wrapping and inconsistent padding for legal links.

data.title: User avatar not updating after upload
data.description: S3 cache-control headers cause clients to see stale avatar images; CDN invalidation missing.

data.title: 404 page missing site nav
data.description: Not Found template fails to include the primary navigation component.

data.title: Password reset email not sent (Mailgun)
data.description: Webhook signature verification fails intermittently; messages are queued but never dispatched.

data.title: Search results pagination off-by-one
data.description: Page count miscalculated when result total is a multiple of page size; last page appears empty.

data.title: Deployment fails on cold start
data.description: Container health check times out on first boot due to missing DB migration step.

data.title: Crash on telemetry parsing
data.description: Nil pointer dereference when decoding optional GPS fields in binary telemetry stream.

data.title: CLI help text typos
data.description: Several command descriptions have spelling mistakes and incorrect flag examples.

data.title: Dashboard fails to render on Firefox ESR
data.description: Optional chaining not transpiled in production bundle; breaks on older Firefox versions.

data.title: ETL job retries not exponential
data.description: Retry policy resets after worker restart causing rapid-fire retries and API throttling.

data.title: Incorrect timezone for daily rollups
data.description: Aggregation runs at UTC midnight but business logic expects America/Los_Angeles.
